ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_HEART.title: Heart of the Phoenix
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_HEART.descript: The first time you play a Power each turn, gain [green]{RegenPower}[/green] [gold]Regen[/gold] and shuffle a [gold]Burn[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_TALON.title: Talons of the Phoenix
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_TALON.descript: When you play an Attack, lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP and gain [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_FEATHER.title: Flight of the Phoenix
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_FEATHER.descri: Skills cost [blue]{Energy}[/blue] less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}. Whenever you play a Skill, lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP.
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_WRATH.title: Phoenix's Wrath
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_WRATH.descript: The first time you lose HP on your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_PRIDE.title: Phoenix's Pride
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_PRIDE.descript: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. At the start of each turn, lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP.
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_GREED.title: Phoenix's Greed
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_GREED.descript: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. At the start of your turn, shuffle a [gold]Burn[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_BRAZIER.title: Brazier of Rebirth
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_BRAZIER.descri: The first time you would die in combat, heal to [green]{Heal}[/green] HP instead.
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_PYRE.title: Ever-burning Pyre
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_PYRE.descripti: At the start of combat, gain [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold]. At the start of each turn, lose [blue]{HpLoss}[/blue] Max HP.
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_TORCH.title: Firestarter
